assertion_results.text: The verification report marks all 5 acceptance criteria as PASS — the diff implements single license filter, comma-separated filter, 400 validation, pagination integration, and unchanged response shape
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 12: 'Acceptance Criteria | PASS | 5 of 5 criteria met'. Lines 18-24 list all 5 criteria individually as PASS: (1) single license filter, (2) comma-separated filter, (3) 400 Bad Request for invalid license, (4) pagination integration, (5) unchanged response shape. Each criterion-N.md file (1-5) also confirms '## Result: PASS' with detailed analysis.

assertion_results.text: Scope containment is PASS — all files in the diff (list.rs, service/mod.rs, tests/api/package.rs) are listed in the task's Files to Modify or Files to Create
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 7: 'Scope Containment | PASS | All 3 changed files match the task specification exactly (2 modified, 1 created)'. Lines 29-31 enumerate: list.rs (modified, listed in Files to Modify), service/mod.rs (modified, listed in Files to Modify), tests/api/package.rs (created, listed in Files to Create). Line 33: 'Out-of-scope files: None'. Line 34: 'Unimplemented files: None'.

assertion_results.text: No sub-tasks are created because there are no review comments (Review Feedback is N/A)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 5: 'Review Feedback | N/A | No reviews or comments exist on the PR'. Line 6: 'Root-Cause Investigation | N/A | No sub-tasks were created in Step 4 or Step 10'.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 output files are report/analysis documents (report.md, criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md). They contain only verification analysis with code excerpts quoted for reference. No output file indicates any code modification, file write, or edit operation was performed on source files. The report describes reading diffs and analyzing code but never modifying it.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md presents findings in a structured table format with 'Overall: PASS' as a summary assessment. There is no merge command, no auto-merge action, no gh pr merge invocation, and no indication the PR was merged. The footer on line 58 states 'This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/verify-pr' — framing it as a comment for human consumption, not an automated merge action.

assertion_results.text: Sensitive pattern scan is PASS — the diff contains no passwords, API keys, or private keys
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 10: 'Sensitive Patterns | PASS | No passwords, secrets, API keys, private keys, or .env references found in diff'. Lines 50-51: 'Searched the PR diff for: password\s*=, secret, API_KEY, BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY, .env — No matches found.'
